_meta.description: Troubleshooting decision tree for SAG Mill (AA criticality)

V-001.question: Is the vibration predominantly from the drive system or the mill body?
V-001.question_fr: La vibration provient-elle principalement du système d'entraînement ou du corps du broyeur?

V-010.question: Check motor bearing vibration with portable analyzer. Is overall velocity >4.5 mm/s (ISO 10816 Zone C)?
V-010.question_fr: Vérifier la vibration du palier moteur avec analyseur portable. Vélocité globale >4.5 mm/s (ISO 10816 Zone C)?

test.description: Measure vibration velocity at motor bearings (V, H, A planes)
test.threshold: ISO 10816: >4.5 mm/s = Zone C (alert), >7.1 mm/s = Zone D (danger)

V-011.question: Is there elevated high-frequency vibration (>5 kHz envelope)? This indicates metal-to-metal contact in bearing.
V-011.question_fr: Y a-t-il une vibration haute fréquence élevée (>5 kHz enveloppe)? Cela indique un contact métal-métal dans le roulement.

test.description: Measure high-frequency envelope spectrum at motor bearings
test.threshold: HFE >5 kHz indicates bearing damage or lubrication failure

V-012.question: Check motor bearing temperature. Is it >10°C above normal trend?
V-012.question_fr: Vérifier la température du palier moteur. Est-elle >10°C au-dessus de la tendance normale?

test.description: Measure bearing temperature with IR thermometer
test.threshold: Temp >20°C above baseline or >95°C → shut down immediately

V-012-DIAG-A.corrective_action: Shut down immediately. Check oil level, relubricate per SKF spec. Inspect bearing for damage.
V-012-DIAG-A.corrective_action_fr: Arrêt immédiat. Vérifier le niveau d'huile, relubrifier selon spéc SKF. Inspecter le roulement.

V-012-DIAG-B.corrective_action: Motor bearing contaminated. Schedule bearing inspection at next shutdown. Clean motor fins and cooling surfaces.
V-012-DIAG-B.corrective_action_fr: Roulement moteur contaminé. Planifier inspection du roulement au prochain arrêt. Nettoyer les ailettes du moteur.

V-013.question: Check gearbox oil sample for metal particles. Is wear metal trending upward?
V-013.question_fr: Analyser l'huile du réducteur pour particules métalliques. Les métaux d'usure sont-ils en hausse?

test.description: Sample gearbox oil - analyze for Fe, Cu, Sn wear metals and ISO particle count
test.threshold: TAN >4.0 mg KOH/g or wear metals step-change → change oil immediately

V-013-DIAG.corrective_action: Gearbox gear wear. Schedule gearbox inspection, change oil, install kidney-loop filtration.
V-013-DIAG.corrective_action_fr: Usure des engrenages du réducteur. Planifier inspection du réducteur, changer l'huile, installer filtration en dérivation.

V-014.question: Check coupling alignment. Is misalignment >0.05 mm offset or angularity?
V-014.question_fr: Vérifier l'alignement de l'accouplement. Désalignement >0.05 mm en offset ou angularité?

test.description: Laser alignment measurement of motor-gearbox coupling
test.threshold: Alignment >0.05 mm → realign per API 686

V-014-DIAG.corrective_action: Coupling misalignment causing friction. Realign per API 686. Check foundation settlement.
V-014-DIAG.corrective_action_fr: Désalignement de l'accouplement causant friction. Réaligner selon API 686. Vérifier tassement de fondation.

V-014-ESC.corrective_action: Vibration source not identified. Escalate to specialist for detailed vibration analysis (orbit, waterfall, order tracking).
V-014-ESC.corrective_action_fr: Source de vibration non identifiée. Escalader vers spécialiste pour analyse détaillée.

V-015.question: Is coupling flex element visually degraded (cracking, deformation)?
V-015.question_fr: L'élément flexible de l'accouplement est-il visuellement dégradé (fissures, déformation)?

test.description: Visual inspection of coupling flex element for cracks, deformation, discoloration
test.threshold: Visible cracks or deformation → replace at next opportunity

V-015-DIAG.corrective_action: Coupling element degraded. Schedule replacement at next shutdown.
V-015-DIAG.corrective_action_fr: Élément d'accouplement dégradé. Planifier remplacement au prochain arrêt.

V-016.question: Are coupling bolts loose? Check for preload loss.
V-016.question_fr: Les boulons de l'accouplement sont-ils desserrés? Vérifier la perte de précharge.

test.description: Check coupling bolt torque with torque wrench
test.threshold: Torque below OEM spec → retorque to specification

V-016-DIAG.corrective_action: Coupling bolts lost preload due to vibration. Retorque to OEM spec. Consider Nordlock washers.
V-016-DIAG.corrective_action_fr: Boulons d'accouplement ayant perdu leur précharge. Resserrer selon spéc OEM. Considérer rondelles Nordlock.

V-020.question: Check mill liner condition. Is liner thickness below OEM minimum?
V-020.question_fr: Vérifier l'état des blindages. L'épaisseur est-elle sous le minimum OEM?

test.description: UT thickness measurement on mill shell at liner bolt locations
test.threshold: Liner at/below OEM minimum → replace within 7 days

V-020-DIAG.corrective_action: Mill liner worn from cascading charge impact. Replace liners at next planned shutdown.
V-020-DIAG.corrective_action_fr: Blindages usés par impact de la charge. Remplacer au prochain arrêt planifié.

V-021.question: Check trunnion bearing vibration. Is there progressive looseness (vibration showing ½× sub-synchronous)?
V-021.question_fr: Vérifier vibration du palier de tourillon. Y a-t-il un jeu progressif (vibration montrant ½× sous-synchrone)?

test.description: Spectrum analysis at trunnion bearing for ½× and harmonics
test.threshold: ½× >50% of 1× → shutdown within 7 days

V-021-DIAG.corrective_action: Trunnion bearing seat fretting. Inspect at next shutdown, apply anti-fretting compound.
V-021-DIAG.corrective_action_fr: Siège de palier de tourillon en fretting. Inspecter au prochain arrêt, appliquer composé anti-fretting.

V-022.question: Check for cracks at trunnion shaft stress concentrations using MPI.
V-022.question_fr: Vérifier les fissures aux concentrations de contrainte du tourillon par MPI.

test.description: MPI inspection at trunnion shaft fillets and keyways
test.threshold: Crack <25% section → monitor quarterly; >50% → remove from service immediately

V-022-DIAG.corrective_action: Fatigue crack at trunnion shaft. CRITICAL: Assess crack size immediately. >25% section → plan repair within 30 days.
V-022-DIAG.corrective_action_fr: Fissure de fatigue au tourillon. CRITIQUE: Évaluer taille immédiatement. >25% section → planifier réparation sous 30 jours.

V-030.question: Both drive and mill body vibrating. Check motor current — is it >100% FLA?
V-030.question_fr: Vibration du système d'entraînement et du corps du broyeur. Vérifier courant moteur — est-il >100% FLA?

test.description: Measure motor current with clamp meter
test.threshold: Current 110-125% FLA → reduce load immediately

V-030-DIAG.corrective_action: Motor overloaded from hard rock feed or charge imbalance. Reduce feed rate immediately. Investigate root cause.
V-030-DIAG.corrective_action_fr: Moteur en surcharge par roche dure ou déséquilibre de charge. Réduire débit d'alimentation. Investiguer cause racine.

T-001.question: Where is the high temperature? Motor, gearbox, or trunnion bearings?
T-001.question_fr: Où se situe la haute température? Moteur, réducteur, ou paliers de tourillon?

T-010.question: Check motor winding temperature (RTD). Is it exceeding thermal class rating?
T-010.question_fr: Vérifier température du bobinage moteur (RTD). Dépasse-t-elle la classe thermique?

test.description: Read motor winding RTD from DCS/SCADA
test.threshold: Temperature approaching OEM max at rated load → clean immediately

T-011.question: Are motor cooling fins visibly covered with dust/contamination?
T-011.question_fr: Les ailettes de refroidissement du moteur sont-elles visiblement couvertes de poussière?

test.description: Visual inspection of motor cooling fins and air intake
test.threshold: Visible contamination → clean motor fins

T-011-DIAG.corrective_action: Motor overheating from dust on cooling surfaces. Clean motor fins immediately. Schedule FT cleaning every 1-3 months.
T-011-DIAG.corrective_action_fr: Surchauffe moteur due à poussière sur surfaces de refroidissement. Nettoyer immédiatement. Planifier nettoyage 1-3 mois.

T-013.question: Check motor current draw. Is phase imbalance >5%?
T-013.question_fr: Vérifier le courant moteur. Le déséquilibre de phase est-il >5%?

test.description: Measure 3-phase current with clamp meter
test.threshold: Voltage imbalance >3% or single phase → trip immediately

T-013-DIAG.corrective_action: Phase imbalance causing motor overheating. Check supply voltage balance at MCC. Investigate power quality.
T-013-DIAG.corrective_action_fr: Déséquilibre de phases causant surchauffe moteur. Vérifier équilibre tension au MCC. Investiguer qualité énergie.

T-012.question: Check motor bearing temperature with IR gun. Is it >10°C above normal?
T-012.question_fr: Vérifier température palier moteur au pistolet IR. Est-elle >10°C au-dessus de la normale?

test.description: Measure bearing housing temperature with IR thermometer
test.threshold: Temp >20°C above baseline or >95°C → shut down immediately

T-020.question: Check gearbox oil temperature. Is it above OEM limit?
T-020.question_fr: Vérifier la température d'huile du réducteur. Est-elle au-dessus de la limite OEM?

test.description: Read gearbox oil temperature from local gauge or DCS
test.threshold: Oil temp >OEM max → investigate

T-021.question: Is gearbox oil level normal and oil condition acceptable (not dark/burnt smell)?
T-021.question_fr: Le niveau d'huile du réducteur est-il normal et l'état de l'huile acceptable (pas sombre/odeur brûlée)?

test.description: Check oil sight glass level and smell/color of oil sample
test.threshold: TAN >4.0 mg KOH/g → change immediately

T-021-DIAG-A.corrective_action: Gearbox oil low. Top up immediately. Investigate seal condition for leaks.
T-021-DIAG-A.corrective_action_fr: Niveau d'huile réducteur bas. Compléter immédiatement. Investiguer état des joints pour fuites.

T-021-DIAG-B.corrective_action: Gearbox oil degraded. Change oil immediately. Sample for wear metals to assess gear condition.
T-021-DIAG-B.corrective_action_fr: Huile réducteur dégradée. Changer l'huile immédiatement. Analyser métaux d'usure pour évaluer engrenages.

T-022.question: Is gearbox running above rated torque? Check motor current.
T-022.question_fr: Le réducteur fonctionne-t-il au-dessus du couple nominal? Vérifier le courant moteur.

test.description: Measure motor current as proxy for gearbox torque
test.threshold: Sustained >100% rated torque → reduce load

T-022-DIAG.corrective_action: Gearbox overloaded. Reduce mill feed rate. Investigate charge composition.
T-022-DIAG.corrective_action_fr: Réducteur en surcharge. Réduire le débit d'alimentation. Investiguer la composition de la charge.

T-030.question: Check trunnion bearing temperature. Is it >10°C above trend?
T-030.question_fr: Vérifier température palier tourillon. Est-elle >10°C au-dessus de la tendance?

test.description: Read trunnion bearing RTD from DCS/SCADA
test.threshold: Rate >2°C/hr → shut down immediately; trip at 95°C rolling, 85°C babbitt

T-031.question: Is trunnion bearing oil flow and pressure normal?
T-031.question_fr: Le débit et la pression d'huile du palier de tourillon sont-ils normaux?

test.description: Check lube oil supply pressure and flow from DCS
test.threshold: Oil pressure below OEM minimum → trip before damage

T-031-DIAG.corrective_action: Low lube oil pressure at trunnion bearing. CRITICAL: Check pump, filter blockage, relief valve. Shutdown if pressure cannot be restored.
T-031-DIAG.corrective_action_fr: Basse pression d'huile au palier tourillon. CRITIQUE: Vérifier pompe, colmatage filtre, soupape. Arrêt si pression non restaurée.

N-001.question: What type of noise? Metallic scraping, grinding, or intermittent knocking?
N-001.question_fr: Quel type de bruit? Frottement métallique, broyage, ou cognement intermittent?

N-010.question: Is the metallic scraping continuous and correlated with rotation speed?
N-010.question_fr: Le frottement métallique est-il continu et corrélé avec la vitesse de rotation?

test.description: Listen with stethoscope at different locations to isolate source
test.threshold: Full rub (continuous contact, temp spike, metallic noise) → IMMEDIATE shutdown

N-010-DIAG.corrective_action: Rub detected between rotating and stationary parts. IMMEDIATE SHUTDOWN required. Inspect clearances at wear rings/seals.
N-010-DIAG.corrective_action_fr: Frottement détecté entre pièces rotatives et fixes. ARRÊT IMMÉDIAT requis. Inspecter jeux aux bagues d'usure/joints.

N-020.question: Is the grinding noise coming from inside the mill (charge area)?
N-020.question_fr: Le bruit de broyage provient-il de l'intérieur du broyeur (zone de charge)?

test.description: Listen at mill shell with stethoscope, compare with normal charge noise profile
test.threshold: Abnormal charge noise → inspect liners at next opportunity

N-030.question: Is the knocking from the drive train (coupling/gearbox area)?
N-030.question_fr: Le cognement provient-il de la transmission (zone accouplement/réducteur)?

test.description: Locate knocking source using directional stethoscope
test.threshold: Coupling knock → check alignment and preload

P-001.question: What performance issue? Low throughput, high power draw, or product quality (grind size)?
P-001.question_fr: Quel problème de performance? Faible débit, puissance élevée, ou qualité produit (granulométrie)?

P-010.question: Check mill charge level (acoustic/power draw). Is charge below optimal?
P-010.question_fr: Vérifier le niveau de charge du broyeur. La charge est-elle sous l'optimal?

test.description: Review mill weight/power draw trend from DCS
test.threshold: Charge significantly below design → investigate feed system

P-010-DIAG.corrective_action: Mill liners worn affecting charge trajectory. Inspect liner profile, replace worn liners.
P-010-DIAG.corrective_action_fr: Blindages usés affectant trajectoire de charge. Inspecter profil des blindages, remplacer les blindages usés.

P-020.question: Check trommel screen condition. Are apertures worn >110% nominal?
P-020.question_fr: Vérifier l'état du trommel. Les ouvertures sont-elles usées >110% nominal?

test.description: Visual inspection of trommel screen panels for wear and damage
test.threshold: Screen apertures >110% nominal → replace panels

P-020-DIAG.corrective_action: Trommel screen worn from abrasion. Replace screen panels. Consider upgrading to polyurethane panels.
P-020-DIAG.corrective_action_fr: Trommel usé par abrasion. Remplacer les panneaux. Considérer mise à niveau vers polyuréthane.

E-001.question: What electrical symptom? Motor trips, insulation alarm, or erratic operation?
E-001.question_fr: Quel symptôme électrique? Déclenchement moteur, alarme isolement, ou fonctionnement erratique?

E-010.question: Measure motor winding insulation resistance with megger. Is IR <50 MOhm?
E-010.question_fr: Mesurer la résistance d'isolement du bobinage au mégohmmètre. IR <50 MOhm?

test.description: Insulation resistance test (megger) on motor windings - requires LOTO
test.threshold: IR <50 MOhm → schedule rewinding within 30 days; IR <1 MOhm/kV → do not energize

E-010-DIAG.corrective_action: Motor insulation degraded. If IR <1 MOhm/kV, DO NOT ENERGIZE. Schedule rewinding within 30 days.
E-010-DIAG.corrective_action_fr: Isolement moteur dégradé. Si IR <1 MOhm/kV, NE PAS METTRE SOUS TENSION. Planifier rebobinage sous 30 jours.

E-011.question: Check for conductive deposits on insulation surfaces (switchgear, MCC).
E-011.question_fr: Vérifier les dépôts conducteurs sur les surfaces d'isolement (appareillage, MCC).

test.description: Visual inspection of switchgear and MCC for dust/contamination deposits
test.threshold: Surface IR <100 MOhm at 500V DC → schedule cleaning within 30 days

E-011-DIAG.corrective_action: Conductive contamination on insulation surfaces. Clean immediately. Schedule FT cleaning every 3-6 months.
E-011-DIAG.corrective_action_fr: Contamination conductrice sur surfaces d'isolement. Nettoyer immédiatement. Planifier nettoyage tous les 3-6 mois.

E-020.question: Check VFD fault codes. Any harmonic or thermal faults?
E-020.question_fr: Vérifier codes défaut du VFD. Des défauts harmoniques ou thermiques?

test.description: Read VFD fault log and alarm history from HMI
test.threshold: THD-I >15% → install output reactor/sine-wave filter

L-001.question: Where is the leak? Gearbox seals, trunnion seals, or lube oil system?
L-001.question_fr: Où est la fuite? Joints du réducteur, joints du tourillon, ou circuit d'huile?

L-010.question: Is the gearbox seal visibly degraded (hardened, cracked, leaking)?
L-010.question_fr: Le joint du réducteur est-il visiblement dégradé (durci, fissuré, fuyant)?

test.description: Visual inspection of gearbox seal area for oil leak evidence
test.threshold: Active leak → schedule seal replacement

L-010-DIAG.corrective_action: Gearbox seal degraded from age. Schedule replacement at next shutdown. Monitor oil level daily until then.
L-010-DIAG.corrective_action_fr: Joint du réducteur dégradé par vieillissement. Planifier remplacement au prochain arrêt. Surveiller niveau huile quotidiennement.

L-020.question: Is there increasing mechanical seal leakage at trunnion?
L-020.question_fr: Y a-t-il une fuite croissante au joint mécanique du tourillon?

test.description: Visual inspection of trunnion seal area for slurry/water leakage
test.threshold: Seal temp trend >5°C/month → investigate

L-020-DIAG.corrective_action: Trunnion labyrinth seal leaking from shaft deflection. Schedule seal replacement. Check shaft alignment.
L-020-DIAG.corrective_action_fr: Joint labyrinthe tourillon fuyant par déflexion d'arbre. Planifier remplacement joint. Vérifier alignement arbre.

L-030.question: Check lube oil system for leaks (piping, connections, cooler).
L-030.question_fr: Vérifier le circuit d'huile pour fuites (tuyauterie, raccords, refroidisseur).

test.description: Walk-down lube oil system, check all connections, cooler, and filter housings
test.threshold: Any active leak → repair immediately to prevent bearing damage

L-030-DIAG.corrective_action: Lube oil system leak found. Repair connection/replace hose. Top up oil level. Monitor bearing temperature.
L-030-DIAG.corrective_action_fr: Fuite trouvée sur circuit d'huile. Réparer connexion/remplacer flexible. Compléter niveau. Surveiller température paliers.
